summary: Iteration 68 - Analytics Cleanup Testing. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) Analytics endpoints return real data only (zeros when no stream data), (2) CSV import is admin-only (403 for non-admin), (3) No hardcoded fake change percentages in UI.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/analytics/overview returns total_streams=0, total_earnings=0, empty streams_by_store, empty streams_by_country, empty daily_streams for new user
Backend: GET /api/analytics/trending returns empty or zero-stream trending items for new user
Backend: GET /api/analytics/leaderboard returns active_releases=0 for new user
Backend: GET /api/analytics/revenue returns total_streams=0, total_gross_revenue=0, total_net_revenue=0 for new user
Backend: POST /api/analytics/import returns 403 'Only admins can import streaming data' for non-admin user
Backend: POST /api/analytics/import succeeds for admin user (imports stream events)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/trending has no hardcoded +12.5% or +8.2% percentages
Backend: GET /api/analytics/leaderboard has no hardcoded growth percentages
Backend: Admin login works for admin@kalmori.com
Backend: Admin login works for submitkalmori@gmail.com
Frontend: Import CSV button IS visible for admin user on Analytics page
Frontend: Import CSV button NOT visible for non-admin user on Analytics page
Frontend: No hardcoded '+12.5%' found in admin Analytics page
Frontend: No hardcoded '+8.2%' found in admin Analytics page
Frontend: No hardcoded '+12.5%' found in non-admin Analytics page
Frontend: No hardcoded '+8.2%' found in non-admin Analytics page
critical_code_review_comments: Analytics endpoints correctly return real data only - no simulated/fake data
CSV import endpoint properly checks user.role === 'admin' and returns 403 for non-admin
Frontend AnalyticsPage.jsx correctly wraps Import CSV button in {user?.role === 'admin' && ...}
Stats cards no longer show hardcoded change percentages (+12.5%, +8.2%)
New users see zeros for all analytics metrics (total_streams=0, total_earnings=0, etc.)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin accounts and created test users via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified analytics cleanup: (1) All analytics endpoints (/analytics/overview, /analytics/trending, /analytics/leaderboard, /analytics/revenue) return real data only - zeros when no stream data exists. (2) CSV import endpoint (/analytics/import) is admin-only - returns 403 for non-admin users. (3) Frontend Import CSV button only visible for admin users (user?.role === 'admin'). (4) No hardcoded fake change percentages (+12.5%, +8.2%) in the UI.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/analytics/overview - returns zeros when no data
GET /api/analytics/trending - returns empty array when no data
GET /api/analytics/leaderboard - returns active_releases=0 when no data
GET /api/analytics/revenue - returns 0 streams and 0 revenue when no data

csv_import_admin_only.non_admin_response: 403 - Only admins can import streaming data

no_hardcoded_percentages.result: None found in backend responses or frontend UI
